summary: Frontend-only E2E mobile test (Expo web preview, viewport 390x844) of ShiftPe completed. All major flows are functional: Splash -> Onboarding (Skip / Next x3) -> Role select (Student/Business) -> Login (+91 phone, 10-digit validation) -> OTP (any 6-digit code) -> Profile setup -> tabs. Student: Swipe deck with Pass/Like, Like triggers Match (It's a Match), Send a Message opens chat thread, chat send works, applied jobs surface in My Shifts > Applied, Profile shows stats/skills/preferences, logout returns to role-select. Business: setup -> dashboard with 4 metric cards (Active Jobs/Applicants/Hires/Rating), Post a New Job CTA opens Create Shift, Publish creates job (active count increments and new job shows in list), Applicants tab has chip filters and 5 accept/reject pairs, Accept updates to 'Accepted' inline, Profile -> Logout works (biz-logout testID present). Only material gap is a testID naming inconsistency for the business setup screen.

ui_bugs.issue: Business setup uses testIDs 'biz-name' and 'biz-continue' but the brief lists 'setup-name'/'setup-continue' as the canonical IDs (Student setup uses setup-name/setup-continue). Naming inconsistency between Student and Business setup screens.

issues: On first paint the briefcase emoji is briefly blank before rendering – minor; resolves within ~200ms.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Repeats on every screen using shadows.soft/button/floating. Reference: /app/frontend/src/theme.ts (shadows tokens)
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Triggered by Tinder card overlays. Reference: /app/frontend/src/components/JobSwipeCard.tsx

After logout returning to role-select, the previous instance of role-select is still mounted in the DOM (selector resolves to 2 elements). Functional but causes selector ambiguity and small memory overhead. Consider router.replace('/role-select') with stack reset (router.dismissAll() before replace) after logout actions.

action_items: Align Business setup testIDs to match the spec: rename 'biz-name' -> 'setup-name' and 'biz-continue' -> 'setup-continue' in /app/frontend/app/business/setup.tsx (or update spec). Currently divergent from /app/frontend/app/student/setup.tsx.

Replace deprecated React Native Web style props: migrate shadow* tokens in /app/frontend/src/theme.ts to boxShadow strings, and migrate any pointerEvents prop to style.pointerEvents (likely in JobSwipeCard.tsx).
On Logout, reset the navigation stack (router.dismissAll() then router.replace('/role-select')) so stale screens don't remain mounted under the new route.
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have testIDs and key flows work end-to-end against mocked data.
Mock OTP correctly accepts any 6-digit code; phone validation gates Continue properly (button disabled until 10 digits).
AsyncStorage persistence wired via app-store; setHasSeenOnboarding/setAuthed/setRole persist correctly (verified by reloading mid-flow).
Tab layout includes a virtual 'center' route handled by a custom CenterFab tabBarButton; center.tsx exists, no router warnings.
Match screen and JobSwipeCard composition is clean; addShift mutates state and surfaces in My Shifts > Applied chip.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all 18 listed flows verified; 1 testID naming inconsistency on business setup)

seed_data_creation: None. App relies on MOCK_JOBS/MOCK_CHATS/MOCK_APPLICANTS/MOCK_NOTIFICATIONS already present in /app/frontend/src/store/mock-data.ts and app-store.tsx.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use preview URL https://shift-worker-hub.preview.emergentagent.com, viewport 390x844. localStorage.clear() + reload to reset to splash. Student happy path: onboarding-skip -> role-student -> phone-input(9876543210) -> login-continue -> otp-input(123456) -> otp-verify -> setup-name -> setup-continue x3 -> swipe-like -> match-chat -> chat-input + chat-send (chat-send only renders after text entered). Business happy path: role-business -> phone -> otp -> biz-name (NOT setup-name) -> biz-continue (NOT setup-continue) -> dashboard -> post-job-cta -> job-title + publish-job -> Applicants tab -> accept-<id>/reject-<id> (testIDs are accept-a1..accept-a5). biz-logout is on Business Profile tab.
rca_of_issue: testID naming divergence between student and business setup screens: /app/frontend/app/student/setup.tsx uses 'setup-name'/'setup-continue', while /app/frontend/app/business/setup.tsx uses 'biz-name'/'biz-continue'. The shared spec in the review request lists only setup-name/setup-continue, which caused initial test failures on the business onboarding step until the actual IDs were grepped. Mitigation: standardize testID naming or document the divergence.
